narrative:
Washington Township has 1,407 registered voters, with 42.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 53.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 49.5 percentage points.
